data.title: IQM Quantum Computers names Jan Goetz as CEO, transitioning from Co-CEO model. Jan Goetz is now sole CEO, while Søren Hein becomes COO. Mikko Välimäki steps down.
data.description: In Finland, IQM Quantum Computers, a top player in full-stack superconducting quantum computers, has made a significant organizational change. The company shifted from a Co-CEO system to a single Chief Executive Officer approach. Dr. Jan Goetz, a co-founder and former Co-CEO, now holds the position of sole CEO from January 1st, as decided by the IQM board. Furthermore, Dr. Søren Hein has taken on the roles of Chief Operating Officer and Deputy CEO. Concurrently, Mikko Välimäki has resigned from his position.

data.title: School Choice Week starts in Vermont with over 100 schools participating in events to help parents choose K-12 schools.
data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week in Vermont and throughout the nation, with a special emphasis on assisting parents in identifying suitable K-12 schools for their children. Over 100 schools in Vermont are participating in this initiative by organizing open houses and events to showcase their offerings.

data.title: SOFTSWISS names Denis Romanovskiy as first Chief AI Officer to enhance tech strategy in iGaming solutions.
data.description: In St. Julian's, Malta on January 26, 2026, SOFTSWISS, a prominent global iGaming solutions provider, announced the appointment of Denis Romanovskiy as its inaugural Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer (CAIO). This strategic move reinforces the company's commitment to advancing its technology capabilities.

data.title: $16.8M stolen from Matcha Meta due to SwapNet exploit; users advised to revoke approvals for router contract.
data.description: Matcha Meta is advising users to cancel one-time approvals for SwapNet's router contract following a smart contract flaw that resulted in the theft of as much as $16.8 million on the Base blockchain.

data.title: NH celebrates National School Choice Week with 100+ participating schools, helping parents find K-12 options. #SchoolChoiceWeek
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in New Hampshire and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their kids. Over 100 schools and organizations in the Granite State are participating in this initiative. The event runs from Jan. 26, 2026, and encourages families to explore educational options for approximately 60,000 students in New Hampshire. This effort is part of a broader campaign involving thousands of events to raise awareness of school choice, with the goal of providing quality education for all students.

data.title: Beko ranked #1 in household durables industry by Corporate Knights Global 100, attaining top spot for sustainability.
data.description: In a press release dated January 26, 2026, it was announced that Beko, a renowned home appliance manufacturer, has attained a top ranking for its dedication to sustainability, innovation, and advanced manufacturing. This recognition aligns with other recent accolades Beko has received from S&P Global, CDP, and EcoVadis, further highlighting the company's commitment to these areas. The acknowledgment underscores Beko's position as a top performer in the industry, showcasing its ongoing efforts towards sustainable practices and cutting-edge production techniques.

data.title: National School Choice Week starts with 28,000 events and 28 governors issuing proclamations, expanding education options.
data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week, with over 28,000 events and activities planned nationwide. 28 governors have issued proclamations in support of this initiative. This week offers parents a chance to discover K-12 educational options for their children.

data.title: South Carolina students and educators promote school choice during National School Choice Week, 420 schools participating.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in South Carolina and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 420 schools in South Carolina are participating by organizing various events...

data.title: Idaho joins National School Choice Week, with over 250 schools participating to help parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Idaho and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the most suitable K-12 schools for their kids. Over 250 schools and organizations in the Gem State are participating in this initiative, which offers resources and support to families navigating educational options. The event spans various locations and is centered around facilitating informed decisions regarding school selection during this crucial period in a child's academic journey.

data.title: Michigan celebrates National School Choice Week with over 810 schools hosting open houses to help parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Michigan and nationwide, dedicated to assisting parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their children. Over 810 schools in Michigan are participating by organizing open houses, engaging families in making informed decisions about their children's education. This initiative aims to empower parents with the opportunity to explore diverse educational options to suit their child's needs.

data.title: School Choice Week begins in West Virginia with over 210 schools joining to help parents find the right K-12 schools.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in West Virginia and nationwide, aimed at aiding parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their kids. Over 210 schools and organizations in the Mountain State are participating in the event.

data.title: Nebraska students and educators participate in School Choice Week with over 150 schools involved in helping parents find K-12 schools for their children.
data.description: Today marks the start of National School Choice Week in Nebraska and nationwide, aimed at assisting parents in selecting suitable K-12 schools for their kids. Over 150 schools and organizations in Nebraska are participating in this event, offering information and resources to parents to aid them in making informed decisions for their children's education.
